# Logo / brand identity

## Motivation

A memorable logo punches above its weight for OSS adoption (think Iceberg, dbt, Polars). Today the README has only the dashboard hero screenshot. A simple wordmark or icon — e.g. a stylised tuning fork or a Dataproc-cube-with-a-chart-arrow — would land harder on first impressions.

## Sub-tasks

- Sketch 2-3 concept directions (text-only wordmark, abstract icon, combined lockup).
- Pick one; produce SVG + PNG variants (light + dark backgrounds).
- Add to `docs/images/logo.{svg,png}` and embed in README §0 hero, replacing or augmenting `1_hero.png`.
- Optional: favicon for the landing.

## Acceptance

Logo appears in README hero on GitHub and on the landing page; renders cleanly at 32px (favicon size) and 200px (hero size).

## Effort

M (design judgement is the time sink; technical SVG export is fast)

## Reference

SP-2 spec — explicitly deferred from SP-2 scope.
